allow: Bash(node -e "var fs=require\(''fs''\); [''components/Logo.tsx'',''components/Nav.tsx'',''components/HeroAnimated.tsx'',''app/layout.tsx'',''app/page.tsx'',''tailwind.config.ts''].forEach\(function\(f\){var s=fs.readFileSync\(f,''utf8''\); var warn=s.indexOf\(''font-sriracha''\)>-1||s.indexOf\(''Sriracha''\)>-1; console.log\(\(warn?''WARN'':''OK''\), f, s.length+''ch''\);}\)")
